zh.lifeSummary: Alice Frazier of Doncaster是Frazier of Doncaster的女兒，於1400年出生在英國越可爾多卡斯特。她於1422年與John de Carter結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1465年在英國越可爾享年65歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾沃特福德聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Frazier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Fregeau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Armand, Camille, Eloi, Fernand, Lucien, Michel, Normand.
French (Frégeau): metathesized form of Fergeau, from an old vernacular form of the Latin personal name Ferreolus, derived from ferrum ‘iron’. Compar Frazier .

variants.name: Fraser
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Frazier of Doncaster was born in 1400, in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of Frazier of Doncaster. She married John de Carter in 1422. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1465, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Watford, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Frazier of Doncasterは1400年にイギリスヨークシュアイアドンカスターでFrazier of Doncasterの娘として生まれた。1422年にJohn de Carterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1465年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで65歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアワトフォードスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's Church, Watford, Hertfordshire: 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓퍼드 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Frazier of Doncaster(은)는 1400년 영국 요르크실르 돈카스터에서 Frazier of Doncaster의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1422년 John de Carter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 요르크실르에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓퍼드 스트 마이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Frazier of Doncaster родилась в 1400 г. в местности донкастир, еркшир, Англия. Её отца звали Frazier of Doncaster. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Carter в 1422 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1465 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри'с чурч, ватфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия.
